frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean passage of suture material through tissue

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Adequate suture length available for knot formation

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture arrangement indicates knot formation phase completion

penalties.description: Entry point at first mark appears approximately 1mm from center
Exit point at second mark appears approximately 1mm from center

confidence_rationale: Task appears completed but video frames show static positions rather than continuous motion. Suture deviation measurements estimated from limited camera angles. Knot completion and cutting phases not clearly visible in provided frames.
cannot_determine: Exact completion of knot pushing and suture cutting phases
Precise measurement of suture deviation due to camera angle limitations
Final knot security under tension testing
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid completion in 40 seconds. Clean suture placement with minimal deviation from target marks. Efficient phase transitions.
strengths: Expert-level completion time well under 60 seconds
Smooth needle loading and placement technique
Minimal suture deviation from target marks
improvement_suggestions: Ensure perpendicular needle entry to minimize deviation
Verify complete knot security before task completion
